---
title: "Data Quality Check Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
      
params: 
  Stat_Outlier: NA

---
  
## Summary
```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

Stat_Outlier <- params$Stat_Outlier
N <- length(Stat_Outlier)
Detected <- purrr::keep(
  Stat_Outlier,
  ~ !is.null(.x[["iqr_outlier"]][["iqr_indicator"]]) &&
    .x[["iqr_outlier"]][["iqr_indicator"]] == TRUE
)
n <- length(Detected)

summary <- dplyr::tibble(
    Params     = c("Number of variable have been checked", "Variable has outlier detected" ),
    Value   = c(N, n)
    ) 

summary_gt <- gt::gt(summary)
gt::tab_options(summary_gt, column_labels.hidden = TRUE)

```
## Explore Outlier 


```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Box-plot
lBox <- list ()

for (i in seq_along(Detected) ){
  item <- Detected[[i]]
  lBox [[i]] <- htmltools::tagList(
    htmltools::h3(item$DataField),
    htmltools::tags$div(
      id = paste0("boxplot-", item$DataField),
      style = "display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:flex-start;",
      htmltools::tags$div(
        style = "flex:1; overflow:auto; max-height:340px; border:1px solid #ddd; padding:1px;",
        htmltools::HTML(gt::as_raw_html(gt::gt(item[["iqr_outlier"]][["iqr_df_ab"]])))
      ),
      htmltools::tags$div(
        style = "flex:1; border:none; padding:0 !important; margin:0 !important;",
        htmltools::plotTag({
          graphics::bxp(item[["iqr_outlier"]][["plot"]], main = "Outlier based on IQR")
        }, alt = "")
      )
    )
  )
}

do.call(htmltools::tagList, lBox)


```
